modules.name: ascript.windows.utils.airclickcv
documentation:
Some snippets of opencv2

## Resize image
ref: <http://docs.opencv.org/modules/imgproc/doc/geometric_transformations.html#void resize(InputArray src, OutputArray dst, Size dsize, double fx, double fy, int interpolation)>

    # half width and height
    small = cv2.resize(image, (0, 0), fx=0.5, fy=0.5)

    # to fixed Size
    small = cv2.resize(image, (100, 50))

## Constant
    1: cv2.IMREAD_COLOR
    0: cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE
    -1: cv2.IMREAD_UNCHANGED

## Show image
    cv2.imshow('image title',img)
    cv2.waitKey(0)
    cv2.destroyAllWindows()

## Generate a blank image
    size = (height, width, channels) = (512, 256, 3)
    img = np.zeros(size, np.uint8)

## Sort points
    pts = [(0, 7), (3, 5), (2, 6)]

    sorted(pts, key=lambda p: p[0]) # sort by point x row, expect [(0, 7), (2, 6), (3, 5)]

## Crop image
    croped = img[y0:y1, x0:x1]

functions.name: ascript.windows.utils.airclickcv.show
documentation: (x1, y1) = min(max(x0, x1), w), min(max(y0, y1), h)
''' 调试用的: 标记一个点 '''

functions.name: ascript.windows.utils.airclickcv.imread
documentation:
Like cv2.imread
This function will make sure filename exists

functions.name: ascript.windows.utils.airclickcv.find_template
documentation:
@return find location
if not found; return None

functions.name: ascript.windows.utils.airclickcv.find_all_template
documentation:
Locate image position with cv2.templateFind

Use pixel match to find pictures.

Args:
    im_source(string): 图像、素材
    im_search(string): 需要查找的图片
    threshold: 阈值，当相识度小于该阈值的时候，就忽略掉

Returns:
    A tuple of found [(point, score), ...]

Raises:
    IOError: when file read error

functions.name: ascript.windows.utils.airclickcv.find_all_sift
documentation:
使用sift算法进行多个相同元素的查找
Args:
    im_source(string): 图像、素材
    im_search(string): 需要查找的图片
    threshold: 阈值，当相识度小于该阈值的时候，就忽略掉
    maxcnt: 限制匹配的数量

Returns:
    A tuple of found [(point, rectangle), ...]
    A tuple of found [{"point": point, "rectangle": rectangle, "confidence": 0.76}, ...]
    rectangle is a 4 points list

functions.name: ascript.windows.utils.airclickcv.brightness
documentation:
Return the brightness of an image
Args:
    im(numpy): image

Returns:
    float, average brightness of an image
